reasoning: MIXED ribbon (slow 682.21 > fast 682.09 > pivot 681.96) with only 25¢ spread is too compressed for clean signal. Sector rotation bearish (XLF −2.8%, XLK −1.18%). Flat overnight gap (+0.28) adds no directional conviction. VIX falling supportive but insufficient with MIXED ribbon. Framework rule: MIXED/tight ribbon without clear stacking = wait-for-clarity. No reliable edge.
